name: the-startup
description: Multi-agent AI framework for Claude Code that implements a startup team structure. Provides spec-driven development (PRD → SDD → Implementation Plan → Code), parallel specialist agent execution, and 10 slash commands across 3 phases. Includes a shell-based installer and statusline component.

findings_summary.notes: Well-documented Claude Code plugin marketplace with MIT license. The install.sh script performs standard plugin installation via Claude Code's plugin system (/plugin marketplace add, /plugin install), downloads a statusline.sh script from GitHub raw, and writes to ~/.config/the-agentic-startup/ and ~/.claude/settings.json. The script is transparent and uses set -e for safety. Plugins directory contains 'start' and 'team' subdirectories. Scripts directory present. No credential collection or exfiltration. The curl-pipe-sh install pattern is standard but carries inherent trust risk (install.sh downloads additional scripts from raw.githubusercontent.com). CHANGELOG.md present, mentioned in awesome-claude-code list. CI/CD badge shown in README. Release workflow present in .github. Minor risk: curl-pipe-sh pattern and downloading secondary scripts at install time.
